name: vendor.myndhyve.knowledge-tools
description: MyndHyve knowledge-tools — first reference consumer of the v1 host.knowledge surface. Two typeIds: (1) knowledge.retrieve — thin pass-through over ctx.knowledge.retrieve with optional score-floor filtering; (2) knowledge.augment-prompt — composition primitive that retrieves + renders a Sources block + builds an augmented user message + emits a citation list. Host advertises host.knowledge: supported per spec/v1/host-capabilities.md §host.knowledge.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Retrieve Knowledge
nodes.description: Issue a RAG retrieval against the host's knowledge base. Surfaces chunks + de-duplicated sources + a hasResults flag. Optional config.scoreFloor drops chunks below a host-normalized relevance score; droppedByScoreFloor reports how many were dropped.

nodes.label: Augment Prompt with Knowledge
nodes.description: Retrieve relevant chunks + build a grounded augmented user message ready to hand to an AI node. Outputs augmentedUserMessage (with embedded Sources block + per-chunk [#N] markers), citations[] for caller-side rendering, and raw chunks/sources for downstream nodes. Falls back to a 'no source material' header when retrieval returns 0 results.
